name: WitnessHead
description: Calibrated confidence scalar over (step k, latent). Norm + linear + sigmoid. Used to decide when denoising has converged.
code:
_wh{{_id}}_x = np.concatenate([{{latent}}.reshape(-1), {{step_embed}}.reshape(-1)], axis=0).reshape(1, -1)
_wh{{_id}}_d = _wh{{_id}}_x.shape[-1]
_wh{{_id}}_mean = np.mean(_wh{{_id}}_x, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_wh{{_id}}_var = np.var(_wh{{_id}}_x, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_wh{{_id}}_normed = (_wh{{_id}}_x - _wh{{_id}}_mean) / np.sqrt(_wh{{_id}}_var + {{eps}})
_wh{{_id}}_W = np.random.randn(1, _wh{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * 0.02
_wh{{_id}}_pre = np.dot(_wh{{_id}}_normed, _wh{{_id}}_W.T)
{{confidence}} = 1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-_wh{{_id}}_pre))
